package rulefixtures

import (
	yaml "gopkg.in/yaml.v3"
)

// scenario for yaml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local YAML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule435NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
	Count int
}

func scenario435Negative(payload []byte) (Rule435NegativeRecord, error) {
	var output Rule435NegativeRecord
	err := yaml.Unmarshal(payload, &output)
	return output, err
}
